raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu arridsan man ne effi
fahwis mannuß Dehluß un man-
as Meitas skuhpstihß? tu effi ne
aprattigi darrijißcho darridans.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Gann buhtu Spehka man-
a Rohkâ jums faunu darriht/
et juhsu Tehwa Deewß irr wak-
r us man runnajis/ fazzidams:
Sargajs / ka tu ar Jehkabu ne
mma no labba us faunu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un mu/ tu effi ahtri ais-
hjis/ jo tu effi ilgodamees il-
jrees pehz tawa Tehwa Nam-
n/ kapchz effi tu mannuß Dee-
us nosadßig?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Jehkabs un
ztija us Lahbanu: Tapehz / ka
bihjajohß/ jo es dohmaju / ka
jaschu tawas Meitas ar War-
ne atrreintu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet pee ka tu tawus
eenus atraffi/ tas lai preekfch
hfeem Brahteem dfihws ne
eek/ mekle / kas tew peederr /
pee man irr / un nemnees
s nohßt. Bet Jehkabs ne sin-
a / ka Raële tohs bij no-
gusi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "un Lahbans gahje Jehka-
Telti/ un Leas Telti/ un to
dejo Kalponu Telti/ un ne at-
de ne neeka/ un wiꞥſch tsgah-
o Leas Telts/ un gahje Raë-
Telti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Raële bij tohs Elka-
wus zehmuft/ un bij tohs ap-
ih to Kameetn-Pakaifn lik-
/ un uſſehdahß teem wirfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta fazzija us fawn
Tehwu: Ne apskaiſtees / mans
Kungs / ka es preekfch tewiß ne
warnu zeltees/ jo man klahjahß/
ka Seewahn mehß buht / un
wiꞥſch pahrmekledams ne atrad-
de tohs Elka-Deewuß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad apskaitahß Jehkabs/
un aisbildinajahß prett Lahbanu/
un Jehkabs atbildeja un fazzija
uhs Lahbanu: Kas irr mans No-
seegums/ kas irr manni Grehki/
ka tu tik karsti man effi pakkat-
dsinnees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka tu effi wiffus mannuß
Rihkus aptaustijs/ ko effi tu at-
raddis no wiffeem tawa Namma
Rihkeim / leez to preekfchâ /
preekfch manncent un taween
Brahteem / ka tee starp mums
abbijeem teefa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schohs diwideſſinitß Gad-
dub efinu es pee tew bijis/ tawas
Awis/ un tawas Kasas ne irr is-
mettuschas / un tohs Annus no
tawahm Awim es ne efinu ehdis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "To faplohfitu es ne efinu
tew pahrneffis/ tas man bij ja-
makfa/ no mannaß Rohkas effi
tu to praffijis/ kaut tas bij ſagts
fappis Deena/ jeb tas bij Nahti
ſagts tappis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es efinu tahdß bijis / ka
man Deend Karstuuns nomahze/
un Nahti Augstuuns/ un Meegs
ne nahze mannaß Alzzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es efinu diwideſſinitß
Gaddus tawa Naimma bijis /
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
